reasoning: Lactate clearance is the primary limiter. Your last ride showed moderate effort at 179.7W, but to excel in the Alpine Loop, we need sharper endurance at higher efforts. Over-Unders will simulate the fluctuating demands of the key climb, improving your ability to sustain target power for a longer duration.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 6x (6 min at 242-256W, 2 min at 201-218W) to mimic the demands of the Alpine Loop climb.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
